items.title: American Express (AXP) Unveils Innovative Travel Tools for Enhanced Card Member Experience
items.description: American Express (AXP) recently introduced new digital travel tools aimed at enhancing the travel experience for Card Members, launching its app for iOS users. Within the last quarter, AXP's share price increased by 11%, amidst several company developments, including a partnership with UPS, the opening of an Aspire Executive Lounge, and dividend declarations. While the company's initiatives, including reaffirmed earnings guidance and the introduction of enhanced travel services, align with...

items.title: American Express brings travel memories on-chain with ‘Amex Passport’
items.description: New app centralizes trip planning and booking; separate Amex Passport mints shareable travel “Stamps” on Base.

items.title: BitMine Reports $10.8 Billion Ethereum, Bitcoin, 'Moonshot' Crypto Holdings
items.description: BitMine Immersion Technologies Inc (AMEX:BMNR) has amassed over 2.15 million ETH tokens worth approximately $10 billion, cementing its position as the world’s largest Ethereum (CRYPOT: ETH) treasury company. What Happened: The company’s total crypto and cash holdings reached $10.771 billion as of Sep. 14, including 2,151,676 ETH, 192 Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), $214 million in “moonshot” investments and $569 million in unencumbered cash. items.title: “People Are Getting Greedy,” Says Jim Cramer When Discussing American Express Company (AXP)
items.description: We recently published 10 Stocks Jim Cramer Discussed As He Talked About President Trump & Trillionaires. American Express Company (NYSE:AXP) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer recently discussed. American Express Company (NYSE:AXP) is one of the largest payments management firms in the world. items.title: American Express wants to simplify travel planning for its cardholders
items.description: The Amex Travel App is designed to help travelers book hotels, flights and transportation.
